hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && FILE="$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty')"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|css|md)$'; then npx --no-install prettier --write "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -Eq '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx --no-install tsc --noEmit >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"tsc --noEmit xato berdi. TypeScript xatolarini tuzating (npm run typecheck)."}'; fi
